scripts.build: vite build && WRANGLER_LOG_PATH=.wrangler/logs wrangler deploy --dry-run --outdir dist --upload-source-maps --env=""
scripts.deploy: WRANGLER_LOG_PATH=.wrangler/logs node ../../scripts/deploy-route-preserving-worker.mjs dist/server/wrangler.json -- --outdir dist --upload-source-maps || (echo '::error::insecur-site Worker deploy failed before Sentry source map upload.' >&2 && exit 1) && node ../../scripts/post-deploy-sentry-sourcemaps.mjs insecur-site dist/server
scripts.deploy:preview: WRANGLER_LOG_PATH=.wrangler/logs node ../../scripts/wrangler-with-deploy-config.mjs dist/server/wrangler.json -- deploy --env preview --keep-vars --outdir dist --upload-source-maps || (echo '::error::insecur-site-preview Worker deploy failed before Sentry source map upload.' >&2 && exit 1) && node ../../scripts/post-deploy-sentry-sourcemaps.mjs insecur-site-preview dist/server
scripts.deploy:preview:dry-run: WRANGLER_LOG_PATH=.wrangler/logs node ../../scripts/wrangler-with-deploy-config.mjs dist/server/wrangler.json -- deploy --env preview --dry-run --outdir dist --keep-vars --upload-source-maps
